info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: This API provides endpoints for an e-commerce system including operations for users, orders, and products. Designed to support robust e-commerce workflows, it emphasizes error handling, usability, and reliability.

post.description: Creates a user account in the system. Requires email, name, phone number and other required registration information. Returns the created user's profile on success.

requestBody.description: All necessary user registration fields, including email, name, and password.

200.description: User registration was successful and user profile is returned.

400.description: User registration failed due to validation errors (e.g., missing required email or password).

example.message: User email and password are required.

409.description: User already exists with the same email or phone number.

example.message: A user already exists with this email address.

500.description: Internal server error while registering user.

example.message: Unable to create user due to unexpected error.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Places a new order for the specified user based on their cart. Returns the placed order details if successful.

200.description: Order placed successfully. Full order summary returned.

404.description: Cart not found for the given userId, so order cannot be placed.

example.message: No cart found for the provided userId.

details.issue: No active cart for this user

400.description: Bad request - userId is missing or invalid.

example.message: Invalid userId provided.

details.issue: userId must be a valid string

500.description: Server error while processing order placement.

example.message: Error occurred while placing the order.

get.description: Retrieves complete details of an order, including the status, items, amount, and more, for the provided orderId.

200.description: Order details returned successfully for a valid orderId.

404.description: Order not found for the given orderId.

example.message: No order found for this orderId.
Invalid orderId format.

500.description: Unexpected server error while fetching the order.

example.message: An error occurred while fetching order details.

post.summary: Add an item to user cart
post.description: Adds a new product to the user's shopping cart. Returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to add to the cart, including quantity and productId.

200.description: Item added successfully. Updated cart is returned.

404.description: No cart exists for this userId, unable to add item.

example.message: No cart found for the provided userId.

400.description: Bad request. Possible invalid productId or quantity.

example.message: Invalid quantity provided.

500.description: Server error occurred while adding item to cart.

example.message: Unexpected error adding item to cart.

get.description: Fetches the current snapshot of a user's shopping cart. Returns all products and prices, including quantity and total.

200.description: Current cart for userId fetched successfully.

404.description: No cart exists for given userId.

example.message: Cart does not exist for the provided userId.

details.issue: Cart does not exist for userId

example.message: userId format invalid.
Error occurred while fetching cart.

get.description: Tracks the shipment status for the given orderId and provides latest status, tracking number, and delivery estimate.

404.description: Shipping/tracking details not found for that orderId.

example.message: Shipping info not found for order.
Invalid orderId supplied for tracking.

500.description: Server error occurred while retrieving tracking info.

example.message: Unable to fetch tracking info due to server error.

post.description: Adds a new product to the catalog, including all product data such as price, name, stock. Returns the created product record.

requestBody.description: All product details to create a new listing in the catalog.

example.name: Bluetooth Speaker
example.description: Portable wireless Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery.

example.name: Bluetooth Speaker
example.description: Portable wireless Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery.

409.description: Product already exists (duplicate found in the catalog).

example.message: A product with this name already exists.
price must be greater than 0.

500.description: Unexpected server error adding new product.

example.message: Database unavailable. Try again later.

post.summary: Receive a payment gateway webhook notification
post.description: Payment gateway calls this endpoint to notify system of a payment status change. Validates gateway response and updates payment record.

requestBody.description: Payment status payload as received from the payment gateway.

200.description: Webhook received and payment status updated.

example.message: Missing or invalid paymentId.

500.description: Internal error while processing webhook notification.

example.message: Payment record update failed.

post.description: Starts the payment flow for an order. Returns the payment record/transaction result.

requestBody.description: Order, gateway and payment details required to initiate payment.

200.description: Payment initiated and gateway response returned.

402.description: Payment required or insufficient funds. Payment could not be completed.

example.message: Insufficient funds for the transaction.
Missing mandatory paymentMethod.
Error occurred while initiating payment.

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response data from the gateway provider.

transactionId.description: Identifier for the payment transaction in gateway.

payment_webhook.description: Payload for payment webhook notifications from payment gateways.

totalAmount.description: Sum of prices of all items before discount.

createdAt.description: ISO date/time when order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: ISO currency code used for payment.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user placing the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discount.

status.description: Status of the order in fulfillment cycle.

updatedAt.description: Latest update timestamp for this order.

order_response.description: Detailed order information returned to client.

createdAt.description: ISO datetime when the user registered.

active.description: Is the user account currently active?

userType.description: Type of user: customer or admin.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

updatedAt.description: ISO datetime when user info was last updated.

price.description: Single unit price of the product.

available.description: Indicates if product is in stock.

description.example: Portable wireless Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery.

product_request.description: Request schema for creating or updating a product.

quantity.description: Number of units for this product.

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount.

order_item.description: An individual item in an order.

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount.

cart_item.description: An individual item in a user's cart.

orderId.description: Order ID that is being tracked.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items before discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied for all items.

userId.description: User ID of the cart owner.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total to be paid after all discounts.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being paid for.

currency.description: Currency in which payment is made.

payment_request.description: Request body for initiating a payment for an order.

userType.description: Type of the user, e.g. customer, admin.

user_request.description: User creation or update request body.

orderId.description: Order ID for which payment was done.

available.description: Whether the product is available for sale.

description.example: Ergonomic aluminum laptop stand for 13-17 inch devices.

product_response.description: Response returned after fetching or updating product details.

status.description: HTTP status code for this error.

path.description: API endpoint path that caused the error.

timestamp.description: Date and time the error occurred.
